_comment: Reconciliation allow-lists for the image-injection pipeline (.kiro/specs/image-injection-pipeline-fix). duplicate_content_allow groups distinct figure ids that may legitimately share identical media (C1). unresolved_allow lists post_com manifest entries that legitimately resolve to 0 captions because the figure is placed by another step or intentionally omitted (C2). NOTE: the 9 entries below (2 appendix photos + 7 'Hasil Kuesioner' survey charts) are NOT caption-based figures in the current draft - the survey charts are placed inline as template drawings during the merge step (image3-image9) and the two photos are handled separately, so their post_com entries resolve to 0 captions by design. They are allow-listed so the injector/validator pass; remove them here if these figures are later converted to caption-based post_com injection.
